evidence.label: EU eIDAS Trust List (Qualified Trust Service Provider)

organization.description: NISZ National Infocommunications Services Company by Shares is listed as a Qualified Trust Service Provider (QTSP) on the EU eIDAS Trust List for Hungary. It provides digital trust services via hiteles.gov.hu.
